summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 17→Jul 23 vs Jul 10→Jul 16* · Revenue +49% (1,574,444 vs 1,054,015 EGP) · Spend +25% · ROAS 6.77 (+19%).
   • CPC: 2.23 → 1.87 EGP (-16%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.03% → 0.81% (-21%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,234 → 1,559 EGP (+26%, up (good))
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 37%* of the move (hurt, -427,007 EGP)  ·  *AOV 36%* of the move (helped, +328,250 EGP)  ·  *CPC 27%* of the move (helped, +44,820 EGP).
   *Read:* *AOV* rose +26%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *328,250 EGP of revenue*.
     That drove ROAS +19%.
     Revenue +49% because spend +25%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *LF video existing post ig*, its AOV went 1891.83 EGP→3896.33 EGP on 7,243 EGP spend (~11% of the swing).

summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 17→Jul 23 vs Jul 10→Jul 16* · Revenue +1% (210,877 vs 209,554 EGP) · Spend +33% · ROAS 3.25 (-25%).
   • CPC: 9.65 → 8.37 EGP (-13%, down (good))
   • CVR: 2.58% → 1.65% (-36%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,612 → 1,647 EGP (+2%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 73%* of the move (hurt, -118,508 EGP)  ·  *CPC 23%* of the move (helped, +9,903 EGP)  ·  *AOV 4%* of the move (helped, +4,480 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -36%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-118,508 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS -25%.
     Revenue +1% because spend +33%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was <https://business.facebook.com/adsmanager/manage/ads?act=336343742536460&selected_ad_ids=120255463433720011|Scaling Robes boys capcut new arrivals - Copy>, its CVR went 5.04%→2.71% on 6,702 EGP spend (~23% of the swing).
